settings.copy_enable_label: Enable copy button on code blocks
settings.copy_enable_help: When enabled, a copy button appears on each code block in posts. Visitors can click it to copy the code to their clipboard.
settings.themes_help: Choose the visual style of the copy button. Each theme uses different icons, colors, and positioning.
settings.codeLang_label: Show language label on code blocks
settings.codeLang_help: Display the detected programming language in the top-right of each code block (e.g. python, bash, javascript). Requires a syntax highlighter that adds language-X classes to your code elements.
